phase: Phase P3A Mainnet Readonly Live-UI Test
summary: Live-readonly mainnet path prepared: a new gateMode 'live-readonly' shows the live wallet UI + real LIFE++ balance reads + PoCC eligibility, but is STRUCTURALLY transfer-incapable (src/config/life-plus.ts keys isLive on exactly 'live'). LifePaymentModule renders readonly copy and forces the dry-run path. A separate wrangler.workers.p3a.jsonc (mainnet-beta, RPC placeholder, all transfer flags false) is provided so the default config stays devnet/mock. No deploy performed.
mainnetRpcConfigured: placeholder (https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com in wrangler.workers.p3a.jsonc; operator must replace with production RPC e.g. Helius/Triton before a real P3A run)
liveUiEnabled: prepared-not-active (default wrangler.workers.jsonc remains gateMode=mock; live-readonly active only when deployed with wrangler.workers.p3a.jsonc)

liveReadonlyMode.transferStructuralReason: src/config/life-plus.ts isLive === (gateMode === 'live'); live-readonly !== 'live' so TRANSFER_ENABLED is always false regardless of AHIN_PROTOCOL_EXECUTION_ENABLED / AHIN_REAL_USAGE_FEE_TRANSFER

config.p3aWrangler: wrangler.workers.p3a.jsonc (separate, worker name ahin-io-p3a, mainnet-beta, gateMode=live-readonly, NEXT_PUBLIC_AHIN_ENV=production so dev routes 404)

uiCopy.readonlyBanner: Mainnet readonly mode (P3A) — real LIFE++ balance may be read; transfer disabled; payment canary disabled; no transaction submitted; no signature requested; no LIFE++ moved.
uiCopy.bottomHint: Mainnet readonly mode — real LIFE++ balance may be read. Transfer disabled · canary disabled · no transaction submitted · no signature requested · no LIFE++ moved.

blockers: Operator-provided production mainnet RPC endpoint (placeholder currently).
Deploy of wrangler.workers.p3a.jsonc is operator action (not done; requires explicit instruction).
OOB verification (LIFE++ mint authority/freeze/supply, Squads treasury, treasury ATA) before any P3B canary.
nextPhase: P3B (single foundation-wallet micro-transfer) remains blocked — requires P3A live-readonly observation + allowlist + cap + kill-switch drill + OOB verification + explicit operator authorization.
